title: 新加坡教育部长论教育中的AI应用
titleEn: Education Minister Desmond Lee on AI in Education
summary: 新加坡教育部在学习科学研究指导下，采取谨慎有目的的方式推进教育中的AI应用。AI应用须服于教学目标和学生发展。
summaryEn: Singapore's Ministry of Education takes a calibrated approach to AI in schools, informed by learning science and international research. AI is used only when it supports educational objectives and student development.
speaker: Desmond Lee
